title: Create Big Cannons: Equally Opposite
description: Makes cannons and projectiles from Create: Big Cannons apply recoil and impact forces to Sable physics objects.
body:
# Create Big Cannons: Equally Opposite

Have you ever attached cannons from Create: Big Cannons to a Create: Aeronautics vehicle and were disappointed that you couldn't feel the recoil of them firing? Have you ever shot at a physics object and watch as the projectile simply caused some damage and bounced off it?

With this mod, both of these scenarios change. The blast of a cannon will rock your vehicle when fired. Enemy shells that slam into your boat might knock you off-course. For every action, there is an equal and opposite reaction.

### Changes:
- Cannons and Autocannons from Create: Big Cannons will now generate recoil forces when fired from the physics object they are attached to.
- Cannon shells and Autocannon rounds will now generate impact forces when they hit a physics object.

This mod is compatible with [Create Big Cannons: Going Ballistic](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-big-cannons-going-ballistic).
